refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level. Decomposing it into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows focused design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 for each sub-cycle phase under defined duty cycle and site conditions, ensuring combined cycle meets CT_target.

candidate_dps: Optimized travel path planning and control
selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system; Optimized travel path planning and control; Efficient dump mechanism control

potential_sources: Load handling and travel phases share vehicle control resources
Travel and dump phases require coordination for timing
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by function but require interface coordination at implementation level.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle control system can support modular control of load, travel, and dump functions.
Risk of timing misalignment between phases impacting cycle time.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit interface definitions between load, travel, and dump control DPs to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and control systems responsible for load handling, travel, and dump operations.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends cycle time and status data to NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives commands from NGHE Solution for cycle execution.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Exchanges safety status and alerts with Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module contains core cycle time functions with minimal diffusion.
NGHE Solution oversees coordination but does not directly implement cycle time functions.
Teleoperation module influences cycle time indirectly; low containment.
Safety Services mainly monitors safety, minimal containment of cycle time functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module is the primary owner of cycle time related DPs, minimizing diffusion and enabling focused optimization.
containment_risks: Potential cross-module coordination overhead with NGHE Solution and Teleoperation.
Safety Services interface may introduce latency impacting cycle time.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Strengthen interface contracts and timing guarantees between Vehicle and other modules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the high-level cycle time requirement into manageable sub-functions with corresponding DPs.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion of control logic between Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.
Teleoperation involvement may cause indirect diffusion.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment of cycle time DPs, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring cycle time telemetry from Vehicle and correlating with tasking commands and safety alerts.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear ownership of cycle time functions assigned to Vehicle module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit timing and interface contracts between Vehicle and NGHE Solution to reduce diffusion risks.
Clarify Teleoperation role in cycle time to avoid indirect coupling.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignment meets the requirements for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility. No immediate need to zigzag or revise at this stage.

revise.why: Current decomposition and assignments are adequate; future levels can proceed with detailed design.

assumptions: Vehicle control systems can modularly implement load, travel, and dump functions.
Interfaces between modules will be well-defined and stable.
open_risks: Timing coordination between phases may impact cycle time performance.
Safety Services interface latency could affect cycle time.
evidence_needed: Cycle time telemetry data under operational conditions.
Interface performance metrics between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
